tasks.title: Identify the temporary sample exposed on /songs
acceptance_criteria: Confirm the current /songs page lists the photographed renderer sample before product code changes.
Record the sample identity and the impacted route behavior.
done_definition: Before-browser evidence or equivalent rendered evidence shows the temporary entry is visible.

tasks.title: Remove the temporary sample from public song data
acceptance_criteria: The songs array no longer contains the janhyang-photo-sample entry.
Aggregate counts on /songs update from the remaining songs data.
No reusable renderer or song detail component is removed.
done_definition: src/lib/songs.ts no longer exports the temporary sample as a song.

tasks.title: Verify songs list and detail routes after cleanup
acceptance_criteria: The /songs page renders without the temporary sample.
A remaining song detail route opens successfully.
Browser verification checks representative list rows, redundant labels, and available-width fit.
TypeScript, lint, and build checks pass when applicable.
done_definition: verify.json records terminal and browser evidence with no blocking issues.

assumptions: The Korean request to remove '잡초' refers to the temporary user-facing renderer sample, specifically the 잔향 photographed chart sample.
This is not a brand-critical screen and does not require human approval before implementation.
The cleanup should preserve all real copied chart entries and the lead-sheet renderer implementation.
risks: If '잡초' referred to a different visual issue, removing the sample may only partially satisfy the user's intent.
The repository lockfiles are not in sync with package.json, so npm ci is unavailable; verification must note the install workaround.
